channel.title: Posts on Bhavin Jawade
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Bhavin Jawade

item.title: Attention is all you need (Paper Explained)
item.description: Transfomers: Attention is all you need. (Explanation) Till 2017, the domain of language modelling, sequence to sequence learning, language translation, image captioning where all dominated by RNNs and LSTMS. For example in a image captioning task you would have CNN based encoder and a LSTM based decoder. Though attention was introduced back in 2015, with NMT paper [Bahdanau et al., 2015] to overcome the fixed context vector drawback of traditional encoder-decoder architecture, it was not untill 2017 “Attention is all you need” paper that its full potential was explored.

item.title: Preflet: Get real-time predictive insights
item.description: This Portuguese based Data Science Startup is trying to make predictive analysis accessible to everyone using its next gen platform called Preflet.

item.title: Linkedin opensources Avro2TF
item.description: Linkedin has always been a active contributor to the opensource community. April 4th, LinkedIn announced a new opensource project Avro2TF..

item.title: Book Review: The Monk Who Sold His Ferrai
item.description: A book that will make you rethink about each and aspect of your life. The book is full of zen techniques to enrich your daily life and inspire you to live with discipline.

item.description: Using Viola Jones algorithm to detect objects in realtime
